name: teamflow
description: TeamFlow is a backend-only RESTful API designed for team task management. It supports authentication, project creation, task assignment, role-based access control, and activity logging. The system allows teams to manage projects and track task progress efficiently.
author: Olalekan Olajide, Ezekiel Donkor, Essien Wisdom Udeme, Ogunkanmi Favour Funmilayo, Goodness ChukwuemekaGoodness Chukwuemeka
